title: platystele oxyglossa
intro: Platystele oxyglossa is a species of orchid, commonly known as a miniature epiphytic orchid native to Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Platystele oxyglossa include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Platystele oxyglossa typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves or roots, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
